title: pseudogynoxys eggersii
intro: Pseudogynoxys eggersii, also known as Solenophora eggersii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a medicinal plant native to the Andes mountain range in Peru, used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin irritations, due to its medicinal properties and health benefits. Pseudogynoxys eggersii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which are the most common herbal preparations used to harness its medicinal properties.
